headline: Should Howmet’s Dividend Move and New Legal Chief Reshape Governance Priorities for HWM Investors?
summary: Howmet Aerospace recently declared a dividend of US$0.12 per share, payable on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 8, 2026, and earlier this month appointed Jonathan Arena as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer and Secretary. These moves come as analysts expect strong year-on-year earnings and revenue growth for Howmet’s upcoming May 7, 2026, quarterly report, reinforcing attention on its execution and governance. With this dividend declaration as a...
